questions.question_text: CO Mapping a How many different words can be formed using the letters M, 0, B, I, L, E, taken all at time, and every word begins with M? b Given A= [ 1 2 3 0 4 5 1 0 6 ] and B = [ 2 0 1 1 3 0 4 5 6 ], Find AB. c Differentiate x √ x w.r.t x d Find ∫𝑑𝑥 1 −1

Out of 4 officers and 10 clerks in an office, a committee consisting of 2 officers and 3 clerks is to be formed. In how many ways can this be done if : any officer and any clerk can be included. one particular clerk must be on the committee. one particular officer cannot be on the committee
Prove by mathematical induction that for all n 𝜖 N, 32n when divided by 8, the remainder is always 1.
If A = [2 1 0 3] and B = [1 4 2 1] , verify if AB ≠ BA
Given A = [ 1 2 3 0 5 6 1 1 1 ] , find AT. Then, verify if AT×A is defined. If yes, compute it.

subparts.text: Find the marginal revenue function MR .
Calculate the price elasticity of demand.

questions.question_text: Determine the area enclosed by the curves y = x2 and y= 4-x2 between x = 1 and x = 3
The marginal cost function for producing q units is MC=10+2q. Find the total cost function if the fixed cost is Rs.100
